children.heading: .—General
children.label: a .—General
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation may take action the Secretary considers necessary to carry out this subchapter, including conducting investigations and public hearings, prescribing regulations and procedures, and issuing orders.

children.heading: .—Conducting Investigations and Public Hearings
children.label: b .—Conducting Investigations and Public Hearings
children.text: In conducting an investigation or public hearing under this subchapter, the Secretary has the same authority the Secretary has under . An action of the Secretary in exercising that authority is governed by the procedures specified in section 46104 and shall be enforced as provided in section 46104.section 46104 of this title
